note: WDLL 51. Main commercial and light-industrial scalar rows transcribed from official Ordinance 2024-18, Appendix II, at https://mcclibraryfunctions-stage.azurewebsites.us/api/ordinanceDownload/11173/1309249/pdf (accessed 2026-07-23). side_corner_ft mirrors base side only as a non-binding sentinel; the appendix does not give a separate corner-side field. RLD uses SF-1, the sole Allowed development type. RMD and RHD use conservative envelopes: max front/side/rear across Appendix I types Allowed by-right (RMD SF-1/SF-2/DF-1/PH-1 => F25/S10/R20; RHD including CF-1/MF-1 abutting-R => F25/S20/R25). Envelope is intentionally stricter than some allowed types and is not a development-type election. OMITTED: CCB alley/end conditions; IH variable triggers; MH corner/adjacent-lot rules; AO, PI, PDD; two-story-adjacency, drive-through, and block-average exceptions in notes 5, 6, and 10.
